items.description: PRD-0013 item 1 (SLICE-0076): Add one frontmatter-id->path index builder in the store, scoped per project, and make id allocation read the max frontmatter id per prefix instead of a filename regex.
steps: Add an id-index builder in the store that maps frontmatter id -> path per project
Change allocation to compute next id from the max frontmatter id per prefix
Write a test: create after an id-only or date-named file with a higher id does NOT re-mint a colliding id
Confirm existing filename-based allocation tests stay green

items.description: PRD-0013 item 2 (SLICE-0077): Make resolveArtifactPath resolve via the id index first, falling back to the existing filename-prefix glob. Blocked by item 1.
steps: resolveArtifactPath checks the id index, then falls back to the filename-prefix glob
Write a test: set/path on a date-named file resolves by frontmatter id
Write a test: a well-named file still resolves (no regression)

items.description: PRD-0013 item 3 (SLICE-0078): Add doctor duplicate-id and dangling-link drift checks via its existing DIAGNOSTICS array; skip cross-project/cross-prefix ids and document that.
steps: doctor groups files by frontmatter id and flags any id mapping to more than one file
doctor resolves link/link_list values and [[id]] body wikilinks against the project id set and flags dangles
Cross-project / cross-prefix ids are skipped; write a test with a planted duplicate id and a planted dangling link, and one cross-project link that is NOT flagged

items.description: PRD-0013 item 4 (SLICE-0079): Add a fmt rename-to-id category (rename to id-slug.md when id/slug mismatch the name, id preserved; id-less files flag-only) and derive renumberLegacyIds prefix set from the registry.
steps: fmt --write renames a mismatched file to id-slug.md preserving the id
Write a test: a [[id]] link to the renamed file still resolves
Write a test: an id-less file is flagged, never auto-renamed
renumberLegacyIds derives its prefix set from the registry (any kind, not just PRD/SLICE)

items.description: PRD-0013 item 5 (SLICE-0080): Drive diagnoseCoreFields off schema.required instead of a hardcoded core-field set so a missing required summary or any required field is flagged.
steps: diagnoseCoreFields reads schema.required
Write a test: a file missing required summary is flagged
Write a test: a file with all required fields passes clean

items.description: PRD-0013 item 6 (SLICE-0081): index.md generation emits an Unindexed (no id) trailer for skipped id-less files and disambiguates duplicate ids inline; re-run stays byte-identical.
steps: index.md emits an Unindexed (no id) trailer listing skipped id-less files
Duplicate ids are disambiguated inline
Write a test: an id-less file appears in the trailer, a duplicate id is disambiguated, and re-run is byte-identical

items.description: PRD-0013 item 7 (SLICE-0082): New verb wiki links <id> printing outbound links (frontmatter link/link_list + body [[..]]) and inbound backlinks scanned via the id index, as a pure vault read (no qmd). Blocked by items 1,2.
steps: wiki links <id> prints outbound links from frontmatter and body wikilinks
wiki links <id> prints inbound backlinks scanned via the id index
Write a test asserting the expected in/out sets
Update src/cli/usage.ts, the README, and skills/wiki/SKILL.md

items.description: PRD-0013 item 8 (SLICE-0083): New verb wiki retitle <id> --title <t> generalizing the type-agnostic relocateArtifact to all kinds (id preserved); keep doc recategorize doc-only. Blocked by item 2.
steps: wiki retitle <id> --title <t> retitles any kind with the id preserved and inbound links surviving
doc recategorize stays doc-only
Write a test for a non-doc artifact retitle
Update src/cli/usage.ts, the README, and skills/wiki/SKILL.md

items.description: PRD-0013 item 9 (SLICE-0084): New verb wiki delete <id> that scans inbound references via the id index and refuses (or warns + lists) before removing, with an explicit override; sync owns index cleanup. Blocked by items 1,2.
steps: wiki delete <id> scans inbound references via the id index
It refuses (or warns + lists) when an inbound reference exists; an explicit override forces removal
Write a test: delete refuses with an inbound reference and the override forces it
Update src/cli/usage.ts, the README, and skills/wiki/SKILL.md
